title: Senior Doctor - Alkem Laboratories Capital India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Alkem Laboratories Capital India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Alkem Laboratories Capital India are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Kolkata. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Alkem Laboratories Capital India:
Alkem Laboratories Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alkem Laboratories Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
